issue.message: ClipModifierKt.clip-USBMPiE can only be called from within the same library group (referenced groupId=`androidx.compose.remote` from groupId=`androidx.glance.wear`)
PaddingModifierKt.padding-WMci_g0 can only be called from within the same library group (referenced groupId=`androidx.compose.remote` from groupId=`androidx.glance.wear`)
RemoteBoxKt.RemoteBox can only be called from within the same library group (referenced groupId=`androidx.compose.remote` from groupId=`androidx.glance.wear`)
SizeModifierKt.fillMaxSize can only be called from within the same library group (referenced groupId=`androidx.compose.remote` from groupId=`androidx.glance.wear`)

PaddingModifierKt.padding-WMci_g0 can only be called from within the same library group (referenced groupId=`androidx.compose.remote` from groupId=`androidx.glance.wear`)
ClipModifierKt.clip-USBMPiE can only be called from within the same library group (referenced groupId=`androidx.compose.remote` from groupId=`androidx.glance.wear`)
